nodes.name: Poll Every 15 Minutes
nodes.notes: Default: every 15 minutes. Configurable in node settings. Timezone set at workflow level (Europe/Madrid).

nodes.name: Fetch & Evaluate
nodes.notes: Fetches /internal/sentinel, builds deterministic fingerprint, decides alert/suppress/recovery. SETUP: edit API_BASE and API_KEY constants at the top. Runtime: uses Node.js http module (n8n sandbox compatible).

nodes.name: Send to Telegram
nodes.notes: SETUP: 1) Select existing OpenClaw Telegram Bot credential (same as other workflows). 2) Replace CONFIGURE_ME with your Telegram chat ID.

nodes.name: Update State
nodes.notes: Advances fingerprint and alert timestamp only after successful Telegram send. On recovery, clears alert timestamp so next issue triggers immediately.
